# RPG Maker PocketBase Cloud Save

Use this skill to implement or debug cloud save sync in RPG Maker MV/MZ with PocketBase. Focus on:

- Correct auth flow with sync code
- Proper handling of slot 0 global info
- Avoiding upload/download loops
- Refreshing title screen after sync

Start with SKILL.md and only read references/notes.md if you need detailed debugging steps.
